name: search-everywhere
description: JetBrains-style Search Everywhere for VS Code: files, symbols, and text in one ranked QuickPick (double-press Shift).

searchEverywhere.maxFileResults.description: Maximum number of file results to show.

searchEverywhere.maxSymbolResults.description: Maximum number of symbol results to show.

searchEverywhere.maxTextResults.description: Maximum number of text-match results to show.

searchEverywhere.textMinQueryLength.description: Minimum query length before full-text search runs.

searchEverywhere.primaryDebounce.description: Debounce in ms for file and symbol search.

searchEverywhere.textDebounce.description: Debounce in ms for the slower full-text search.

searchEverywhere.recentFilesCount.description: How many recent files to show when the query is empty.

searchEverywhere.maxFileCandidates.description: Upper bound on files scanned for file and text search. Raise for large repos at the cost of speed.

searchEverywhere.respectEditorExcludes.description: Also honor the editor's files.exclude and search.exclude settings when searching.

searchEverywhere.additionalExcludes.description: Extra glob patterns to exclude from all searches, e.g. "**/*.min.js".
